facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa sits on a private beach on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, and it delivers exactly what that sounds like. Outdoor pools. A beach bar. A restaurant that doesn't ask you to leave. 4.6 stars across 1,390 reviews backs it up. Book a few nights and actually slow down. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Private beach. Beach bar. Outdoor pool. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is 4.6 stars for a reason. Tag your travel buddy who needs this.
